Localization.Description: A user logged in to zVirt Engine or logged out of it

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to zVirt Engine on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged out of zVirt Engine on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log out of zVirt Engine on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to zVirt Engine on host {event_src.host}
